commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Discord-only fallback in the shared route resolver that maps a non-default accountId to a same-named agent and adds two resolver tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main passes Discord accountId into resolveAgentRoute and falls through to the default route when explicit binding tiers miss; the PR-introduced phantom-agent path follows from pickFirstExistingAgentId returning sanitized input when no agents exist.
commands.review_followup: External PR changes permission-sensitive routing and still needs maintainer routing-policy approval plus contributor-provided real Discord proof before any repair or merge path is useful.

target.title: fix(routing): map discord account IDs to matching agents
target.author: aworki
